item.title: 阿尔忒弥斯 2 号成功发射，人类时隔 54 年重返月球轨道
item.guid: 阿尔忒弥斯-2-号成功发射，人类时隔-54-年重返月球轨道
item.description:
According to CBC News and BNN Bloomberg, today, NASA's Artemis II mission successfully launched from Kennedy Space Center in Florida. 据 CBC News 及 BNN Bloomberg 报道，今天，NASA 阿尔忒弥斯 2 号（Artemis II）任务从佛罗里达州肯尼迪航天中心成功发射升空。

This marks humanity's first return to lunar orbit since Apollo 17 in 1972, and the first crewed flight of the "Artemis Program" since its inception in 2017. 这是自 1972 年阿波罗 17 号以来，人类首次重返月球轨道，也是「阿尔忒弥斯计划」自 2017 年启动以来的首次载人飞行。

During the mission, the crew will conduct comprehensive tests on the spacecraft's critical life support systems, including air, water, safety equipment, and will for the first time test a new generation waste management system in a deep space environment. 任务期间，机组将对飞船的关键生命支持系统进行全面测试，包括空气、水、安全设备，以及首次在深空环境下测试新一代废物处理系统。

Mike Greenley, CEO of Canada's MDA Space, stated that this is a significant moment that 'opens a new phase for the Canadian economy.' As a technical contribution to the Artemis program, Canada has gained opportunities for lunar science experiments, technology demonstration rights, and two astronaut flight seats. 加拿大 MDA Space 公司 CEO 迈克·格林利（Mike Greenley）表示，这是「开启加拿大经济新阶段」的重要时刻。作为对阿尔忒弥斯计划的技术贡献，加拿大由此获得了月球科学实验机会、技术演示权益，以及两个宇航员飞行席位。

According to data from The Planetary Society, the SLS rocket has cost approximately $23.8 billion since its inception in 2011, and the Orion spacecraft's development cost reached $20.4 billion. NASA's total expenditure on the entire program from 2006 to its first test launch in 2022 amounted to $49.9 billion. 根据行星协会数据，SLS 火箭自 2011 年立项以来已耗资约 238 亿美元，猎户座飞船研发成本达 204 亿美元，NASA 在整个计划上从 2006 年至 2022 年首次测试发射期间的总支出高达 499 亿美元。

Greenley also stated that the company has deployed related technology on Mars probes for over 15 years and is currently designing a new type of Mars rover for the European Space Agency. 格林利还表示，该公司已在火星探测器上部署相关技术超过 15 年，目前正在为欧洲航天局设计新型火星探测车。

Greenley stated that all lunar activities are ultimately preparations for human landings on Mars—'The lunar program is not just for the Moon itself, but to solve all problems so that we can go further to Mars in the future.' 格林利表示，所有月球活动最终均是为人类登陆火星做准备——「月球计划不仅是为了月球本身，更是为了解决一切问题，以便未来更远地前往火星。」

item.title: 或成人类史上最大规模 IPO，SpaceX 秘密递交 IPO 申请
item.guid: 或成人类史上最大规模-IPO，SpaceX-秘密递交-IPO-申请
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, SpaceX has confidentially submitted a draft registration statement for an IPO to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). Sources indicate that this move positions the company for a potential official listing in June this year, completing its IPO ahead of OpenAI and Anthropic. 据彭博社报道，SpaceX 已向美国证券交易委员会（SEC）秘密提交了 IPO 的注册草案申请，消息人士透露此举使其有望于今年 6 月正式上市，在 OpenAI 和 Anthropic 之前率先完成 IPO。

Sources revealed that SpaceX is targeting a valuation of over $1.75 trillion, with an expected IPO fundraising size of up to $75 billion. If successful, this would be the largest IPO in the history of human capital markets, far exceeding Saudi Aramco's 2019 record of $29 billion. 知情人士透露，SpaceX 的目标估值超过 1.75 万亿美元、此次 IPO 预计募资规模高达 750 亿美元，如果成行，这将是人类资本市场史上最大规模的 IPO，远超 2019 年沙特阿美 290 亿美元的纪录。

Additionally, SpaceX is signaling to potential IPO investors that it plans to arrange 'testing-the-waters' investor meetings with company executives this month to further support its valuation target. 此外，SpaceX 正向潜在 IPO 投资者发出信号，预计本月将安排公司高管进行「预路演」（testing-the-waters）投资者会议，以进一步支撑其估值目标。

It is understood that this IPO plans to involve a significant number of retail investors, with up to 30% of the offering shares allocated to individual investors . Furthermore, the company is considering adopting a dual-class share structure to ensure that insiders like Elon Musk maintain a dominant position in company decision-making. 据悉，此次 IPO 计划引入较大规模的散户投资者参与， 最高可将 30% 的发行份额分配给个人投资者 。此外，公司还在考虑采用双重股权架构，以确保马斯克等内部人士在公司决策中保持主导地位。

item.title: Claude Code 高危漏洞曝光：clone 一个项目，摄像头和密码就被拿走
item.guid: Claude-Code-高危漏洞曝光：clone-一个项目，摄像头和密码就被拿走
item.description:
Security researcher Jack Cui recently publicly tested and demonstrated a high-risk security vulnerability in Claude Code, revealing severe risks in AI programming tools at the system permission level. 安全研究者 Jack Cui 近日公开实测并演示了 Claude Code 中一个高危安全漏洞，揭示 AI 编程工具在系统权限层面存在的严峻风险。

Jack Cui's demo project only contained a .claude configuration folder and an empty Python script. After typing 'claude' and pressing Enter in the terminal, the computer's camera was silently activated, and local key information was automatically written to a text file, with zero interaction and zero prompts throughout the entire process. Jack Cui 的演示项目仅包含一个 .claude 配置文件夹和一个空的 Python 脚本。在终端输入 claude 并回车后，电脑摄像头被静默调起、本地密钥信息被自动写入文本文件，整个过程零交互、零提示。

The problem stems from Claude Code's built-in 'hooks' mechanism, which allows developers to define automated scripts in the .claude/settings.json configuration file within the project directory. These scripts are then silently executed when the user runs the 'claude' command, without any confirmation prompts. 问题源自 Claude Code 内置的「hooks」机制，允许开发者在项目目录下的 .claude/settings.json 配置文件中定义自动化脚本，并在用户运行 claude 命令时静默执行，全程不弹出任何确认提示。

In addition to poisoning hooks configurations, attackers can also configure malicious MCP servers via .mcp.json files to automatically connect to external tools, bypassing user approval; or define malicious hooks in the frontmatter area of skill plugins, triggering them when sub-agents execute tasks. 除 hooks 配置投毒外，攻击者还可通过 .mcp.json 文件配置恶意 MCP 服务器，绕过用户审批自动连接外部工具；或通过 skill 插件的 frontmatter 区域定义恶意 hooks，在子代理执行任务时触发。

Currently, Anthropic's official source has pushed a patched version. Developers using Claude Code should immediately run `npm install @anthropic-ai/claude-code@latest` to update to the latest version, and should also be cautious about cloning unfamiliar open-source projects containing a `.claude` directory recently. 目前，Anthropic 官方源已推送修复版本。使用 Claude Code 的开发者应立即执行 npm install @anthropic-ai/claude-code@latest 更新至最新版，近期还应谨慎 clone 包含 .claude 目录的陌生开源项目。

🔗 Related reading: After going through 500,000 lines of leaked Claude Code, I finally discovered its secret to being useful 🔗 相关阅读： 翻遍Claude Code泄露的50万行代码，我终于发现了它好用的秘密

item.title: 智谱市值破 4000 亿港元，CEO：API 涨价 83% 仍供不应求
item.guid: 智谱市值破-4000-亿港元，CEO：API-涨价-83%-仍供不应求
item.description:
According to China Business News, after Zhipu announced its first annual results post-listing, the company's stock price surged by 33.24%, with its total market capitalization exceeding HK$400 billion , closing at HK$412 billion, setting a new historical high. 据第一财经报道，在智谱公布上市后首份年度业绩后，公司股价大涨 33.24%， 总市值突破 4000 亿港元 ，收于 4120 亿港元，创历史新高。

According to Cailian Press, at the subsequent 2025 earnings briefing, Zhipu CEO Zhang Peng revealed that in the first quarter of this year, the pricing for Zhipu GLM model API calls has increased by 83%, yet market demand has not cooled down; instead, call volume grew by 400% year-on-year , indicating an overall supply-demand imbalance. 另据财联社，在随后举行的 2025 年业绩说明会上，智谱 CEO 张鹏透露，今年一季度， 智谱 GLM 模型 API 调用定价已提升 83%，但市场需求并未因此降温，调用量反而同比增长 400% ，整体呈现供不应求的态势。

Zhang Peng stated that Zhipu has now become one of the domestic manufacturers with the highest consumption of paid tokens. 张鹏表示，智谱目前已成为国内付费 Token 消耗量最高的厂商之一。

item.title: 「最后一家也顶不住了」，国内安卓五大厂商全线涨价
item.guid: 「最后一家也顶不住了」，国内安卓五大厂商全线涨价
item.description:
Yesterday, the information source @DigitalChatStation posted on Weibo that all TOP 5 mainstream Android manufacturers in China have confirmed price increases, and the 'last major manufacturer' also followed suit with price adjustments starting in April. The price increases cover both new and old products, including phones and tablets. 昨天，信息源 @数码闲聊站 在微博发布消息，国内 TOP 5 主流安卓厂商已全部确认涨价，「最后一家大厂」亦于 4 月起跟进调价，涨价范围覆盖新品与老品，手机、平板均在此列。

In response to the question 'Isn't memory pricing falling recently?', the blogger replied that memory prices had previously multiplied several times, and while there has been a slight pullback recently, the overall market remains at a high level. 针对「内存近期不是在跌价？」的质疑，该博主回应称，内存价格此前已翻了几倍，目前虽有小幅回落，但整体大盘仍处于高位。

Regarding the specific meaning of "old product price increases," the blogger cited OPPO, vivo, iQOO, OnePlus, and Honor as examples, pointing out that older models released by these brands have generally increased in price by 500 yuan. 对于「老品涨价」的具体含义，该博主以 OPPO、vivo、iQOO、一加、荣耀为例，指出上述品牌已发布的老款机型普遍涨价 500 元。

item.title: 原特斯拉中国区总经理孔艳双加盟小米，接手汽车销售业务
item.guid: 原特斯拉中国区总经理孔艳双加盟小米，接手汽车销售业务
item.description:
According to Jiemian News, Kong Yanshuang, the former General Manager of Tesla China, officially joined Xiaomi in early March. She will take over from Li Xiaorui, the former Director of Xiaomi Auto, to be responsible for automotive sales. Currently, Xiaomi has not yet officially announced her position, and Kong Yanshuang is still in the handover phase. 据界面新闻报道，原特斯拉中国区总经理孔艳双已于 3 月初正式入职小米，将接替原小米汽车总监李晓锐，负责汽车销售方面的工作。目前小米内部尚未正式发文通告其职位，孔艳双仍处于工作交接阶段。

Public records show that Kong Yanshuang is a core executive of Tesla China, having served as General Manager of Tesla China's South China Region and China Regional General Manager, among other positions, and has long led Tesla's sales system layout and brand promotion in the Chinese market. 公开资料显示，孔艳双是特斯拉中国区核心高管，历任特斯拉中国华南大区总经理、中国区域总经理等职务，长期主导特斯拉在中国市场的销售体系布局与品牌推广。

It is worth noting that another employee with a Tesla background joined Xiaomi at the same time as Kong Yanshuang. This employee, codenamed "Eason," serves as the "Political Commissar" of the Xiaomi Auto Department and is also a member of the Xiaomi Group Staff Department. The Xiaomi Group Staff Department is a core department that assists the CEO in formulating and supervising the group's development strategy. 值得注意的是，与孔艳双同期入职小米的还有另一位特斯拉背景员工，该员工化名「Eason」，出任小米汽车部「政委」，同属小米参谋部成员。小米集团参谋部是协助 CEO 制定并督导集团发展战略的核心部门。

An insider close to Xiaomi told Jiemian News that it is extremely rare for new employees to join Xiaomi directly into the Staff Department, but this indirectly reflects the "value" of the relevant employees and Xiaomi's determination to enhance its automotive retail capabilities. 一位接近小米的知情人士向界面新闻表示，新员工加入小米直接进参谋部极为罕见，但这侧面反映出相关员工的「含金量」，以及小米提升汽车零售能力的决心。

A Xiaomi Auto Department employee pointed out that Xiaomi's automotive retail system was laid out referencing the Tesla model from the very beginning of its planning, and currently, among the general managers of provincial companies and regional managers, a considerable proportion of personnel have a Tesla background . 一位小米汽车部员工指出，小米汽车零售体系在规划之初便参考特斯拉模式铺设，目前各省公司分总和区域经理中， 相当比例的人员都有特斯拉背景 。

item.title: 多车企公布 3 月交付成绩单
item.guid: 多车企公布-3-月交付成绩单
item.description:
Yesterday, several car manufacturers successively announced their sales and delivery data for March this year: 昨天，多家车企相继公布今年 3 月销量及交付数据：

    BYD sold 300,222 vehicles in March, a month-on-month increase of 98.44%;

    Nio: Delivered 35,486 new vehicles, a year-on-year increase of 136.0%, and a month-on-month increase of 70.6%;

    Xpeng Motors: Delivered 27,415 vehicles in March, a month-on-month increase of 80%;

    Zeekr: Delivered 29,318 vehicles in March, with year-on-year and month-on-month increases of 90% and 23% respectively;

    Leapmotor: Delivered 50,029 vehicles, a year-on-year increase of 35%;

    Li Auto: Delivered 41,053 vehicles, a year-on-year increase of 12%;

    Avatr: 5,143 units sold in March;

    Geely Group: Sales of 233,031 vehicles, flat with the same period last year;

    Seres: New energy vehicle sales of 22,700 units in March, a year-on-year increase of 20.74%;

    Zeekr Auto: Delivered 29,318 new vehicles, with year-on-year and month-on-month increases of 90% and 23% respectively;

    GAC Aion Hyper BU: Sales of 38,268 vehicles, with both year-on-year and month-on-month growth;

    GAC Toyota: Sales of 66,127 vehicles, with Q1 sales of 171,584 vehicles;

    Deepal Auto: Global sales of 31,742 vehicles, a month-on-month increase of 87.8%;

    Yipai Technology: Sales of 27,505 units;

    Xpeng Motors: Delivered 27,415 units, a month-on-month increase of 80%;

    Xiaomi Auto: Deliveries exceeded 20,000 units, with over 7,000 units of the new generation SU7 already delivered;

    Voyah: Delivered 15,019 units, a year-on-year increase of 50%;

    BAIC BluePark (subsidiary): Sales of 13,647 units, a year-on-year decrease of 4.35%;

    IM Motors: Sales of 7,187 units, a 97% year-on-year surge in the first quarter;

    M-Hero: Sales of 2,036 units, a month-on-month increase of 97.1%;

    Jishi Auto: Delivered 1,480 units, a year-on-year increase of 40.2%.

item.title: 特斯拉 Model S / X 正式停产，马斯克：一个时代结束了
item.guid: 特斯拉-Model-S-/-X-正式停产，马斯克：一个时代结束了
item.description:
Tesla CEO Elon Musk announced yesterday on X that custom orders for Tesla Model S and Model X have officially closed, marking the end of production for both models. 特斯拉 CEO 埃隆·马斯克昨日在 X 宣布，特斯拉 Model S 与 Model X 的定制订单已正式关闭，两款车型的生产就此画上句号。

Musk stated that a small number of inventory vehicles are still available for purchase, and Tesla will hold a formal ceremony to commemorate the end of this era. "I love these two cars," he wrote, attaching a photo of himself attending the mass production launch event 14 years ago. 马斯克表示，目前仍有少量库存车辆可供购买，特斯拉将举办一场正式仪式，以纪念这一时代的终结。「我热爱这两款车，」他写道，并附上了一张 14 年前自己出席量产发布活动的照片。

The Model S began deliveries in 2012, with the first 1,000 units released as "Signature" limited editions; the Model X began deliveries in 2015, known for its iconic "falcon-wing" rear doors. Model S 于 2012 年开始交付，首批 1000 辆以「Signature」限量版形式推出；Model X 则于 2015 年开始交付，以标志性的「猎鹰翼」后门闻名。

Currently, the Tesla official website still displays several Model S and Model X inventory vehicles, all of which are all-wheel-drive versions, equipped with the Luxe package, offering free Supercharging benefits and a free supervised FSD subscription service. 目前，特斯拉官网仍展示有若干 Model S 与 Model X 的库存车辆，均为全轮驱动版本，搭载 Luxe 套装，提供免费超充权益及免费监督版 FSD 订阅服务。

Musk announced earlier this year during Tesla's Q4 earnings call that he would gradually phase out production of the Model S and Model X, with the Fremont, California factory's capacity shifting to mass production of Optimus humanoid robots, targeting an output of 1 million units. 马斯克在今年早些时候的特斯拉 Q4 财报电话会议上已宣布将逐步退出 Model S 与 Model X 的生产，其位于加利福尼亚州弗里蒙特的工厂产能将转向 Optimus 人形机器人的量产，目标产量为 100 万台。

item.title: 股价跌去近三成后，甲骨文裁员数千人
item.guid: 股价跌去近三成后，甲骨文裁员数千人
item.description:
According to CNBC, Oracle has begun notifying employees that the company will conduct a new round of layoffs, affecting thousands of people. 据 CNBC 报道，甲骨文（Oracle）已开始通知员工，公司将进行新一轮裁员，规模达数千人。

The layoffs come as Oracle is heavily betting on AI infrastructure development. As a result, the company's stock price has cumulatively fallen by approximately 25% to 29% this year, a larger drop than all other tech giants. As of May 2025, Oracle's global workforce totals approximately 162,000 employees. 此次裁员的背景是甲骨文正大举押注 AI 基础设施建设。为此，公司今年以来股价已累计下跌约 25% 至 29%，跌幅超过所有科技巨头。截至 2025 年 5 月，甲骨文全球员工总数约为 16.2 万人。

The company disclosed in a regulatory filing in March this year that the total cost of its fiscal year 2026 restructuring plan is expected to reach up to $2.1 billion, primarily consisting of employee severance and related expenses. 公司在今年 3 月的监管文件中披露，2026 财年重组计划的总成本预计将高达 21 亿美元，主要由员工遣散费及相关支出构成。

Additionally, Oracle filed documents late yesterday under the Worker Adjustment and Retraining Notification Act (WARN Act), disclosing that it will lay off 491 employees working remotely in Washington State and in its Seattle office on June 1, but stated that the Seattle office location will remain. 此外，甲骨文昨天晚些时候依据《工人调整和再培训通知法》（WARN Act）提交文件，披露将于 6 月 1 日裁减 491 名在华盛顿州远程办公及西雅图办公室工作的员工，但表示西雅图办公地点将继续保留。

TD Cowen analysts previously noted in a January research report that laying off 20,000 to 30,000 employees could generate an additional $8 billion to $10 billion in free cash flow for the company. Following the layoff announcement, Oracle's stock price rose by over 5% intraday yesterday. 投行 TD Cowen 分析师此前在 1 月的研报中指出，裁减 2 万至 3 万名员工，可为公司带来 80 亿至 100 亿美元的自由现金流增量。裁员消息公布后，甲骨文股价昨日盘中一度上涨逾 5%。

item.title: 萝卜快跑回应车辆「趴窝」在路中间：武汉全区域暂停服务
item.guid: 萝卜快跑回应车辆「趴窝」在路中间：武汉全区域暂停服务
item.description:
According to Southern Metropolis Daily, on the evening of March 31, multiple Apollo Go self-driving vehicles in Wuhan suddenly stopped in the middle of the road, causing traffic congestion and accidents. Some car owners reported that they crashed into the stopped vehicles due to insufficient time to react, resulting in damage to their car fronts. 据《南方都市报》，3 月 31 日晚，武汉多辆萝卜快跑（Apollo Go）无人驾驶车辆突然停在道路中间，造成交通拥堵并引发事故。部分车主反映因躲避不及撞上停车车辆，导致车头受损。

The Wuhan Public Security Bureau Traffic Management Bureau reported that the accident was initially determined to be caused by a system malfunction. Passengers had safely exited the vehicles, with no injuries reported. The cause of the accident is still under further investigation. 武汉市公安局交通管理局通报初步判断此次事故为系统故障所致，乘客已安全下车，无人员受伤，事故原因仍在进一步调查中。

Yesterday, RoboRun's official customer service confirmed to reporters that all services in Wuhan have been temporarily suspended, stating, "Current capacity is strained, and there are no vehicles available for service at the moment. Please choose other modes of transportation." 昨天，萝卜快跑官方客服向记者确认，武汉全区域已暂时停止服务，「当前运力紧张，暂时没有可以接待的车辆，请更换其他出行方式。」

Regarding the temporary suspension of vehicles, customer service stated, "We are truly sorry, and we will continue to optimize in the future," but did not disclose the service resumption time. 而针对车辆临停一事，客服表示「确实非常抱歉，后续会持续进行优化」，但并未透露恢复服务时间。

item.title: 东风日产广告图被指抄袭极氪、尚界，原作方喊话：无耻
item.guid: 东风日产广告图被指抄袭极氪、尚界，原作方喊话：无耻
item.description:
According to Bian News, yesterday, traditional production company "Ant Vision" publicly called out Dongfeng Nissan on social media, accusing its NX8 model and several promotional images for the "Teana Harmony Cockpit S380 Master Edition" of plagiarizing advertising concepts previously created by Ant Vision for Zeekr 9X and Shangjie H5. 据鞭牛士报道，昨天，传统制作公司「蚂蚁视觉」在社交媒体公开喊话东风日产，指控其旗下 NX8 车型及「天籁·鸿蒙座舱 S380 大师版」的多张广告宣传图，涉嫌抄袭蚂蚁视觉此前为极氪 9X 及尚界 H5 制作的广告创意。

Some netizens discovered a significant anomaly in the reflection on the water in the NX8 advertisement—the NX8 has hidden door handles, but the water reflection showed the shadow of traditional mechanical door handles, which matches the characteristics of the Shangjie H5 model. This led to external suspicion that the reflection directly used material from the Shangjie H5 . 有网友发现，NX8 广告图中水面的倒影存在明显异常——NX8 为隐藏式门把手，但水面倒影中却出现了传统机械门把手的阴影，与尚界 H5 的车型特征吻合，由此 引发外界怀疑该倒影直接使用了尚界 H5 的素材 。

In the advertisement comparison for the S380 Master Edition, the original author from Ant Vision also pointed out that Dongfeng Nissan's advertisement images were highly similar in composition logic, light and shadow treatment, and color style to the creative work they produced for Zeekr 9X—both images use a modern glass curtain wall as a background, employing warm yellow backlighting with a distinct halo; 在 S380 大师版的广告对比中，蚂蚁视觉原作者同样指出，东风日产的广告图与其为极氪 9X 制作的创意在构图逻辑、光影处理及色调风格上高度雷同——两张图均以现代化玻璃幕墙为背景，采用暖黄色侧逆光并带有明显光晕；

In another comparison image, both use a city street as a background, applying a dynamic blur effect with warm yellow tones, and the vehicle's position and orientation are also almost identical. 另一张对比图中，两者均以城市街道为背景，运用动态模糊效果搭配暖黄色调，车辆位置与朝向亦几乎一致。

Regarding the plagiarism accusation, the original creator stated: "This behavior is shameless. We spent a lot of time, human resources, and financial resources on our work, and Dongfeng Nissan directly removed our car and replaced it with theirs, which is highly unethical." 针对此次抄袭指控，原作方表示：「这种行为很无耻，我们花费了大量时间、人力财力做的作品，东风日产直接把车扣掉了，换成他们的车，十分不道德。」

item.title: 奇瑞宣布放 1 天春假，但要用年假来换
item.guid: 奇瑞宣布放-1-天春假，但要用年假来换
item.description:
According to Bian News, Chery Automobile recently issued an internal notice announcing that April 3, 2026, will be uniformly designated as a spring holiday, connecting with the subsequent Qingming Festival statutory holiday (April 4th to 6th), forming a total of a 4-day long break. 据鞭牛士报道，奇瑞汽车近日发布内部通知，宣布将 2026 年 4 月 3 日统一安排为春假休假日，与随后的清明节法定假期（4 月 4 日至 6 日）连休，共计形成 4 天长假。

The notice stated that this move aims to actively respond to the national spring holiday policy, encouraging employees to better balance work and life and relax after work. 通知称，此举旨在积极响应国家春假政策，鼓励员工在工作之余更好地平衡生活、放松身心。

However, the notice also clarified that the spring holiday will primarily use employees' personal annual leave quota; if an employee has no remaining annual leave, it will be treated as compensatory leave. 然而，通知同时明确， 春假优先使用员工个人年假额度，若员工已无年假则按调休处理。

It is worth noting that Chery Automobile had previously faced public scrutiny over its overtime culture. 值得关注的是，奇瑞汽车此前曾因加班文化问题受到舆论质疑。

Yin Tongyue, Chairman of Chery, once publicly bowed and apologized at a group meeting, and subsequently introduced management reform measures known as the "Three Iron Rules": strictly prohibiting company-level meetings on weekends and Saturdays, clearly ensuring time for employees working in different locations to reunite with their families, and significantly streamlining the number of meetings and participants. 奇瑞董事长尹同跃曾在集团大会上公开鞠躬致歉，并随即推出被称为「三条铁律」的管理改革措施：严格禁止在周末及周六组织公司级会议、明确保障异地员工与家庭团聚的时间，以及大幅精简会议数量与参会人数。

item.title: 腾讯全系「龙虾」产品首批通过信通院 OpenClaw 基线能力评估
item.guid: 腾讯全系「龙虾」产品首批通过信通院-OpenClaw-基线能力评估
item.description:
On April 1st, the China Academy of Information and Communications Technology (CAICT) announced the results of its "Cloud OpenClaw Baseline Capability Assessment," with five Tencent products—WorkBuddy, QClaw, Lightweight Cloud OpenClaw, Cloud Desktop Cloud Phone Claw, and ClawPro—being the first batch to pass the assessment. 4 月 1 日，中国信息通信研究院公布「云端 OpenClaw 基线能力评估」结果，腾讯旗下 WorkBuddy、QClaw、轻量云 OpenClaw、云桌面云手机 Claw 及 ClawPro 五款产品首批通过评估。

Addressing potential security risks such as uncontrolled permissions, data leakage, and uncontrollable costs associated with OpenClaw, CAICT focused on industry transformation pain points and technological upgrade demands. It led the drafting of the "Cloud OpenClaw Baseline Capability Requirements" standard and conducted a systematic assessment around five core dimensions: "Trusted Functionality," "Controllable Charges," "Reliable Permissions," "Traceable Sources," and "Manageable Capabilities." 针对 OpenClaw 存在的权限失控、数据泄露和成本不可控等潜在安全风险问题，中国信通院聚焦产业转型痛点与技术升级需求，牵头撰写《云端 OpenClaw 基线能力要求》标准，并围绕「功能可信」「收费可控」「权限可靠」「来源可溯」「能力可管」五大核心维度开展系统性评估。

This successful assessment means that all of Tencent's "Claw" products fully meet the aforementioned national-level standard requirements. 此次通过评估，意味着腾讯全系「龙虾」产品全面达到上述国家级标准要求。

item.title: 广州警方颁布无人机新规
item.guid: 广州警方颁布无人机新规
item.description:
Guangzhou police yesterday issued a "Civilian Drone Management Notice," clarifying registration and filing requirements, flight regulations, and legal responsibilities in accordance with regulations such as the "Interim Regulations on the Flight Management of Unmanned Aircraft." 广州警方昨天发布「民用无人机管理提示」，依据《无人驾驶航空器飞行管理暂行条例》等规定，明确登记备案要求、飞行规范及法律责任。

According to regulations, all civilian drone owners (including individuals, legal entities, and other organizations) must complete real-name registration and filing on the CAAC UOM platform and the public security filing mini-program "Unmanned Aircraft Public Security Management Platform" before conducting flight activities. 按照规定，所有民用无人机所有者（含个人、法人及其他组织）须在民航 UOM 平台及公安备案小程序「无人驾驶航空器公安管理平台」完成实名登记备案，方可开展飞行活动。

  • Within suitable airspace, micro drones below 50 meters true altitude, and light and small drones below 120 meters true altitude, do not require application; 适飞空域内，微型无人机真高 50 米以下、轻型和小型无人机真高 120 米以下，无需申请；
  • For controlled airspace (above 120 meters true altitude, restricted areas, etc.), approval must be applied for from air traffic control agencies before 12:00 PM on the day prior to the flight; 管制空域（真高 120 米以上、禁区、限制区等）须在飞行前 1 日 12 时前向空管机构申请获批；
  • It is prohibited to alter the factory performance of drones by adding hardware or modifying software. 禁止通过加装硬件或修改软件等方式改变无人机出厂性能。

Flying without real-name registration as required by regulations may result in a fine of less than 200 yuan; in serious cases, a fine of 2,000 yuan to 20,000 yuan may be imposed. Flying in controlled airspace without approval may result in a fine of less than 500 yuan; in serious cases, the drone may be confiscated and a fine of 1,000 yuan to 10,000 yuan may be imposed. 未按规定实名登记即飞行的，可处 200 元以下罚款，情节严重者处 2000 元以上 2 万元以下罚款；未经批准在管制空域内飞行的，可处 500 元以下罚款，情节严重者没收无人机并处 1000 元以上 1 万元以下罚款；

Those with more serious circumstances will also face administrative detention of 5 to 10 days. For criminal acts such as flying at excessive altitudes or illegally cracking drones, criminal liability will be pursued according to law. 情节较重者，还将面临 5 日以上 10 日以下行政拘留。对于超高飞行、非法破解无人机等构成犯罪的行为，将依法追究刑事责任。

item.title: 💡 招聘顾问：AI 时代，求职者也要反向考察公司的 AI 成熟度
item.guid: 💡-招聘顾问：AI-时代，求职者也要反向考察公司的-AI-成熟度
item.description:
According to Business Insider, as AI technology rapidly penetrates the workplace, job seekers proactively asking employers about their AI strategy during interviews has become an increasingly important skill. 据《商业内幕》报道，随着 AI 技术加速渗透职场，求职者在面试中主动询问雇主的 AI 战略，已成为一项越来越重要的技能。

Jeff Hyman, a recruitment consultant with approximately 30 years of experience, stated that determining whether a company is truly implementing AI or merely "telling a story" is a core task candidates need to accomplish during interviews. 拥有约 30 年经验的招聘顾问 Jeff Hyman 表示，判断一家公司究竟是在真正落地 AI，还是仅仅在「讲故事」，是候选人在面试中需要完成的核心功课。

He suggests directly asking about the company's AI strategic plan for the year to help candidates determine whether the enterprise views AI as a growth engine or merely a cost-reduction tool. 他建议直接询问公司今年的 AI 战略规划，以帮助候选人判断企业是将 AI 视为增长引擎，还是单纯的降本工具。

At the tool level, Hyman believes that the way AI access permissions are configured is the most direct signal of how much a company values the technology. He thinks candidates are entirely justified in asking whether the company provides employees with paid AI tools or if they are expected to rely on free versions and figure things out themselves. 在工具层面，Hyman 认为，AI 访问权限的配置方式，是衡量一家公司对该技术重视程度最直接的信号。他认为，候选人完全有理由追问公司是否为员工提供付费 AI 工具，抑或只能依赖免费版本自行摸索。

Companies that are stingy with AI send a clear signal: they want the benefits AI brings but are unwilling to invest in it.

Erin McGoff, founder of the career education platform AdviceWithErin, warns against "AI-intoxicated" companies—enterprises that excessively believe AI will disrupt everything. Conversely, companies where AI has little to no substantial impact on their business are also worth noting. Both extremes should be observed. 职业教育平台 AdviceWithErin 创始人 Erin McGoff 提醒，要警惕那些「AI 醉驾」式的公司——即过度笃信 AI 将颠覆一切的企业，与之相对的，则是那些 AI 对业务几乎没有实质影响的公司，两种极端都值得留意。

Finally, McGoff suggests that candidates directly ask whether the company provides systematic AI training and support or leaves everything for employees to figure out themselves. Mooney also recommends concluding with open-ended questions such as "How does AI impact your daily work and business?" and "How has it changed the way you manage your team?" 最后，McGoff 建议候选人直接询问公司是否会提供系统性的 AI 培训与支持，还是将一切留给员工自行摸索。Mooney 也推荐以开放式问题收尾，例如「AI 如何影响你们的日常工作和业务？」以及「它如何改变了你管理团队的方式？」

item.title: 2899 元起，OPPO K15 Pro 系列正式发布
item.guid: 2899-元起，OPPO-K15-Pro-系列正式发布
item.description:
Yesterday, OPPO officially released the new K15 Pro series, focusing on gaming performance and thermal design, targeting the mid-range performance market. 昨天，OPPO 正式发布 K15 Pro 系列新机，主打游戏性能与散热设计，定位中端性能市场。

OPPO K15 Pro: OPPO K15 Pro：

    Equipped with Dimensity 8500 SUPER, with a built-in active cooling fan;

    50MP OIS main camera + 8MP ultra-wide angle, 16MP front camera;

    Built-in 7500mAh battery, supports 80W fast charging;

    6.59-inch 2760×1256 OLED flat screen, 144Hz refresh rate;

    Body thickness 8.3mm, weight 200g, metal frame, Crystal Shield glass, IP66/IP68/IP69 dust and water resistance;

    Color options: Cyber Light Wing, Origin Gray, Light Dust Pink, Golden Legend;

    Price: Simple pack 12GB + 256GB for 2899 yuan (without charger, protective case), 12GB + 512GB top-tier version for 3499 yuan.

OPPO K15 Pro+: OPPO K15 Pro+：

    Equipped with Dimensity 9500s, also featuring a cooling fan;

    50MP OIS main camera + 8MP ultra-wide-angle + 16MP front camera;

    Built-in 8000mAh battery, 100W fast charging;

    6.78-inch 2772×1272 OLED flat screen, 165Hz refresh rate;

    7000mm² VC vapor chamber, coaxial quad-speaker unit, Lingxi buttons (supports multi-position custom button mapping);

    Body thickness 8.33mm, weight 219g, Crystal Shield glass, IP66/IP68/IP69 dust and water resistance;

    Color options: Cyber Wing, Origin Gray, Light Dust Pink;

    Price: 12GB + 256GB for 3099 yuan (without charger, protective case), 12GB + 512GB for 3999 yuan.

item.title: 三星上线「晕车神器」：听一分钟，管两小时
item.guid: 三星上线「晕车神器」：听一分钟，管两小时
item.description:
Samsung recently quietly launched a free app called Hearapy, claiming that listening to a specific frequency sound for just one minute can alleviate motion sickness symptoms for up to two hours. The app is currently available on the Play Store. 三星近日悄然上线了一款名为 Hearapy 的免费 App，声称只需聆听一分钟特定频率的声音，即可将晕动症症状缓解效果维持长达两小时。该 App 目前已在 Play 商店上架。

The app's overall interface is simple, and its function is equally straightforward—playing a 100Hz pure tone. Samsung recommends listening at approximately 85 decibels and suggests using it with Galaxy Buds 4 Pro to ensure accurate low-frequency output, with a default duration of 60 seconds. 应用整体界面简洁，功能同样很简单——播放 100Hz 的纯音。三星建议以约 85 分贝的音量聆听，并推荐搭配 Galaxy Buds 4 Pro 使用，以确保低频输出的准确性，默认时长为 60 秒。

It is reported that the scientific basis for this app comes from a peer-reviewed study published by Nagoya University in 2025 in the journal "Environmental Health and Preventive Medicine" (doi.org/10.1265/ehpm.24-00247). 据悉，这款 App 的科学依据来自名古屋大学 2025 年发表于《环境健康与预防医学》期刊的一项同行评审研究（doi.org/10.1265/ehpm.24-00247）。

The research team recruited 82 subjects with motion sickness and tested them in three scenarios: rocking chairs, driving simulators, and real vehicles. The results showed: 研究团队招募了 82 名晕动症受试者，在摇椅、驾驶模拟器和真实车辆三种场景下进行测试，结果显示：

After listening to a 100Hz pure tone at 80 to 85 decibels for 1 minute in advance, subjects' objective balance indicators (center of gravity sway trajectory) significantly improved, subjective motion sickness scores (MSAQ) significantly decreased, and symptoms such as gastrointestinal discomfort, central dizziness, and drowsiness were all alleviated, with effects lasting approximately 2 hours.

However, this study only validated the effects in ordinary passenger car scenarios and did not cover other modes of transportation such as airplanes, ships, or long-distance buses. Furthermore, the original experiment used calibrated audio equipment, not consumer-grade headphones. Whether it is truly effective still requires personal experimentation. 不过，这项研究仅对普通乘用车场景进行了验证，并未覆盖飞机、轮船或长途巴士等其他交通方式，且原始实验使用的是经过校准的音频设备，而非消费级耳机。 是否真的有用，还需要自己亲自试验。

item.title: 阿里发布 Wan2.7-Image：千人千面，告别「AI 脸」
item.guid: 阿里发布-Wan2.7-Image：千人千面，告别「AI-脸」
item.description:
Yesterday, Alibaba released Wan2.7-Image, a unified model for image generation and editing, focusing on "thousand faces" character customization, precise color control, and interactive editing, while simultaneously launching a more powerful Pro version. 阿里昨天发布图像生成与编辑统一模型 Wan2.7-Image，主打「千人千面」角色定制、精准色彩控制与交互式编辑，同步上线性能更强的 Pro 版本。

    Supports prompt-level customization of facial features such as face shape and eye shape, bidding farewell to "AI standard faces";

    Color Palette: One-click extraction of reference image color schemes, free control over color quantity and proportion;

    Supports 3K token input, 12 languages, with print-level quality;

    Supports group image generation, with a maximum output of 12 images per single generation;

    Added "Interactive Editing," allowing precise replacement and movement of elements after selecting an area, supporting multi-subject consistency for up to 9 images.

Currently, users can call the API through the Alibaba Cloud Bailian platform or directly experience it on the Wanxiang official website. 目前，用户可通过阿里云百炼平台调用 API，或前往万相官网直接体验。

🔗 Related reading: Multimodality is not about piecing together modules; the new Qwen model proves the most crucial thing 🔗 相关阅读： 多模态不是拼模块，千问新模型证明了最关键的一件事

item.title: 高德开源全球首个统一架构具身操作基座模型 ABot-M0，多项测试达 SOTA
item.guid: 高德开源全球首个统一架构具身操作基座模型-ABot-M0，多项测试达-SOTA
item.description:
Amap recently announced the official full open-sourcing of ABot-M0, the world's first robot embodied operation foundation model based on a unified architecture, with the core concept of "one general brain adapting to various forms of embodied robots." 高德日前宣布正式全量开源 ABot-M0，这是全球首个基于统一架构的机器人具身操作基座模型，核心理念为「一个通用大脑适配多种形态的具身机器人」。

ABot-M0 has achieved SOTA (State-of-the-Art) performance in multiple authoritative benchmark tests, including Libero, Libero-Plus, RoboCasa, and RoboTwin 2.0. ABot-M0 在 Libero、Libero-Plus、RoboCasa、RoboTwin 2.0 等多个权威基准测试中均达到 SOTA 水平。

Specifically, on the Libero-Plus benchmark, the task success rate reached 80.5%, an increase of nearly 30% compared to the previous industry benchmark solution Pi0; on the LIBERO benchmark, the average success rate reached 98.6%, surpassing competing solutions such as X-VLA and GR00T-N1.6. 其中在 Libero-Plus 基准上，任务成功率达 80.5%，较此前业界标杆方案 Pi0 提升近 30%；在 LIBERO 基准上，平均成功率达 98.6%，超越 X-VLA、GR00T-N1.6 等竞争方案。

This open-sourcing covers three dimensions: data, algorithms, and models, and simultaneously releases the project paper "ABot-M0: VLA Foundation Model for Robotic Manipulation with Action Manifold Learning." 此次开源覆盖数据、算法、模型三大维度，并同步发布项目论文《ABot-M0: VLA Foundation Model for Robotic Manipulation with Action Manifold Learning》。

💻 GitHub: https://github.com/amap-cvlab/ABot-Manipulation 💻 GitHub: https://github.com/amap-cvlab/ABot-Manipulation

📄 Full paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2602.11236 📄 论文全文： https://arxiv.org/pdf/2602.11236

item.title: 广州早茶新规正式公布：茶位费必须配茶、传统点心须 24 小时内现制
item.guid: 广州早茶新规正式公布：茶位费必须配茶、传统点心须-24-小时内现制
item.description:
According to Yangcheng Evening News, Guangzhou City officially announced the "Guangzhou Morning Tea Inheritance Protection Regulations," which will come into effect on May 1st this year. 据羊城晚报报道，广州市正式公布《广州早茶传承保护规定》，该规定将于今年 5 月 1 日起施行。

The "Regulations" for the first time clarified the legal definition of Guangzhou morning tea, defining it as a food and beverage consumption pattern that originated, developed, and is popular in the Guangzhou region, conforms to the characteristics of intangible cultural heritage, takes tea drinking paired with Cantonese dim sum as its core form, integrates Lingnan food culture, social customs, and traditional techniques, and possesses unique regional identification. 该《规定》首次明确了广州早茶的法律定义，将其界定为产生、发展并流行于广州地区、符合非物质文化遗产特征，以饮茶搭配广式点心为核心形式，融合岭南饮食文化、社交习俗与传统技艺的具有独特地域标识性的饮食消费形态。

Regarding the identification of production methods, the regulations define "handmade, freshly made and sold, not fresh, not eaten" as the core boundary distinguishing traditional from non-traditional production, requiring that morning tea food prepared on-site in a traditional manner must not exceed 24 hours from preparation to serving . 在制作方式的认定上，规定以「手工现做现售、不鲜不食」作为区分传统与非传统制作的核心界限，要求 以传统方式现场制作的早茶食品，从制成到提供食用的时间不得超过 24 小时 。

Operators must also clearly indicate to consumers on menus or other prominent locations whether food is "traditionally prepared on-site" or "non-traditionally prepared." The two preparation methods for the same category of items may have different prices. Furthermore, the regulations require operators to display the dim sum processing procedures to consumers through transparent, open, or video-monitored kitchens. 经营者还须在菜单或其他显著位置向消费者明示食品属于「传统方式现场制作」还是「非传统方式制作」，同一品类的两种制作方式可执行不同价格。此外，规定要求经营者通过透明式、开放式或视频监控式厨房等形式向消费者展示点心加工过程。

Regarding the long-standing consumer concern about tea charges, the regulations stipulate that operators charging tea fees must provide options such as black tea, green tea, oolong tea, Pu-erh tea, and chrysanthemum tea for consumers to choose from, and provide corresponding tea services; 针对消费者长期关注的茶位费问题，规定明确：收取茶位费的经营者必须提供红茶、绿茶、乌龙茶、普洱茶、菊花茶等供消费者选择，并做好相应茶饮服务；

All charged items must be clearly and prominently priced. The pricing content displayed on in-store menus, price tags, self-ordering applications, and other channels must remain consistent. For illegal acts of failing to clearly mark prices as required, the regulations set corresponding legal liabilities. 所有收费项目须以显著、清晰方式明码标价，店内菜单、价签、自助点餐应用程序等渠道显示的标价内容须保持一致。对于未按规定明码标价的违法行为，规定设置了相应法律责任。

item.title: 迟到半年，《王者荣耀》开放 iPhone 17 标准版 120 帧模式
item.guid: 迟到半年，《王者荣耀》开放-iPhone-17-标准版-120-帧模式
item.description:
Tencent's "Honor of Kings" yesterday welcomed its S43 new season update, "Meeting on the Path," which enabled the 120fps "Extreme High" graphics mode for the standard iPhone 17 model. 腾讯《王者荣耀》昨日迎来 S43 新赛季「陌上相逢」更新，开放了 iPhone 17 标准版机型的 120fps「极高」画质模式。

About half a year has passed since the official release of the iPhone 17 series. While the iPhone 17 Pro and Pro Max previously received 120fps frame rate support, the adaptation for the standard version has been delayed. 距离 iPhone 17 系列正式发布已过去约半年时间，iPhone 17 Pro 与 Pro Max 此前已获得 120fps 帧率支持，标准版的适配却迟迟未至。

However, the iPhone Air still has not received 120fps support in this update, seemingly "forgotten" . 然而， iPhone Air 在本次更新中仍未获得 120 帧支持，似乎「被遗忘」 。

item.title: 央视起底「进口」保健品乱象：澳洲工厂地址是汽修站，品牌故事是编的
item.guid: 央视起底「进口」保健品乱象：澳洲工厂地址是汽修站，品牌故事是编的
item.description:
According to CCTV News, "Aussie Health," which ranks first in sales of lutein products on Douyin and Tmall, is actually a domestic product. The Australian production address marked on its product packaging was found by reporters to be a car repair shop after on-site verification. 据央视新闻报道，在抖音、天猫叶黄素品类销量均位居第一的「澳洲优思益」，实为国产产品。其产品包装上标注的澳大利亚生产地址，经记者实地核查，实际上是一家汽车维修站。

Mr. Lu, the head of Hangzhou Suoxiang Marketing Planning Co., Ltd., which is responsible for the product's marketing planning, frankly told reporters: "This is a company in Guangzhou, and the product is also from Guangzhou; we just packaged it as Australian." 负责该产品营销策划的杭州索象营销策划有限公司负责人卢总对记者直言：「这是广州的一家公司，产品也是广州的，只是我们把它包装成了澳洲的。」

Furthermore, the "Aussie Health" product packaging lacks the "blue hat" label required for health food products. Customer service on both Tmall and Douyin platforms refused to provide consumers with product origin and producer information, citing "merchant information protection." Currently, both "Aussie Health" Douyin and Tmall overseas flagship stores have suspended operations. 此外，「澳洲优思益」产品包装上并无保健食品须具备的「蓝帽子」标识，天猫、抖音两大平台客服亦均以「商家信息保护」为由，拒绝向消费者提供产品产地和生产者信息。目前，「优思益」抖音、天猫海外旗舰店两家店铺均已暂停营业。

In response to the aforementioned reports, the official "Aussie Health" WeChat account issued a statement yesterday. 针对上述报道，「优思益」官方公众号于昨日发布声明回应。

The statement said that the Melbourne, Australia address mentioned in the report is the registered address of the brand owner, YARRA VIBE PTY LTD, which is the brand's own property, was previously used as an office space, and was marked as the brand's postal address (POSTAL ADDRESS) on the official website of the Australian Therapeutic Goods Administration (TGA). 声明称，报道中提及的澳大利亚墨尔本地址，系品牌持有人 YARRA VIBE PTY LTD 的注册地址，属品牌方自有物业，曾作为办公场所使用，并经澳大利亚治疗用品管理局（TGA）官网标注为品牌通讯地址（POSTAL ADDRESS）。

The statement explained that due to business adjustments, the address has ceased to be used, and the brand owner has subleased the property to a car repair shop. The registration and update procedures for the new office address are currently being processed. 声明解释，因业务调整，该地址已停止使用，品牌方将该物业转租给一家汽修厂，新办公地址的注册更新手续正在办理中。

Regarding the product's origin, the statement admitted that its first-generation iron drink product was previously authorized for production by a factory of a domestic listed nutrition company, and stated that "its domestic production-related information has been fully and publicly explained to consumers through various channels such as product detail pages and customer service inquiries." 在产品产地问题上，声明承认旗下第一代铁饮产品曾授权国内营养品上市企业工厂生产，并表示「其国内生产相关信息已通过产品详情页、客服咨询等多种渠道，向消费者进行了充分、公开的说明」。

The statement also indicated that, starting from 2025, the production of this product has been transferred to a New Zealand factory. 声明同时表示，自 2025 年起，该产品的生产已转移至新西兰工厂。

The statement also said that the company has delisted all relevant products and suspended all external sales channels, will fully cooperate with the investigation by relevant departments, and promised to disclose the progress of the investigation and self-inspection results at an appropriate time. 声明还表示，公司已下架全部相关商品并暂停所有对外销售渠道，将全力配合有关部门调查，并承诺在合适时机公开调查进展及自查结果。

item.title: 曝迪士尼高层有意收购 Epic Games，正在等待时机
item.guid: 曝迪士尼高层有意收购-Epic-Games，正在等待时机
item.description:
According to IGN and the Los Angeles Times, Disney executives are internally discussing the possibility of a full acquisition of Epic Games, but are currently waiting for the right moment. 据 IGN 和《洛杉矶时报》报道，迪士尼高层内部正在讨论全面收购 Epic Games 的可能性，但目前仍在等待合适时机。

Veteran tech journalist Alex Heath revealed on The Town podcast that some Disney executives have explicitly expressed support for the acquisition, stating, "I know for a fact that there are senior executives at Disney who want to acquire Epic, they're just waiting for that moment." He also pointed out that there are dissenting voices internally who believe the move would not be wise. 资深科技记者 Alex Heath 在 The Town 播客中透露，迪士尼内部已有高管明确表态支持收购，「我确切知道迪士尼有高层管理人员希望收购 Epic，只是在等待那个时机。」他同时指出，内部也存在反对声音，认为此举并不明智。

Just last week, Epic Games CEO Tim Sweeney announced in an internal email that the company would lay off over 1,000 employees and cut $500 million in costs, reducing the company's workforce to approximately 4,000 people after the layoffs. Sweeney attributed this adjustment to a continuous decline in Fortnite user engagement since 2025. 就在上周，Epic Games CEO Tim Sweeney 在内部邮件中宣布裁员逾 1000 人、削减 5 亿美元成本，裁员后公司员工规模将缩减至约 4000 人。Sweeney 将此次调整归因于《堡垒之夜》用户参与度自 2025 年起持续下滑。

item.title: 《天才游戏》发布剧照，4 月 4 日上映
item.guid: 《天才游戏》发布剧照，4-月-4-日上映
item.description:
According to Maoyan Movies, the film "Genius Game" released a set of stills yesterday. The film will be released on April 4th and is currently in the pre-sale stage. 据猫眼电影消息，电影《天才游戏》昨日发布一组剧照，影片将于 4 月 4 日上映，目前正处于预售阶段。

The film is directed by Cheng Liang, starring Peng Yuchang and Ding Yuxi, with Li Manxuan also starring. The film's narrative revolves around a "scapegoat conspiracy" and a "life-and-death struggle." 影片由程亮执导，彭昱畅、丁禹兮领衔主演，李蔓瑄主演，影片围绕「顶罪阴谋」与「生死博弈」展开叙事。
